title: DCSync: Directory Replication from Non-Domain Controller
description: Detects directory replication requests (Event 4662) with DS-Replication-Get-Changes GUIDs from non-machine accounts — classic DCSync attack via mimikatz lsadump::dcsync.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = '4662' and ('Properties' like '*1131f6aa-9c07-11d1-f79f-00c04fc2dcd2*' or 'Properties' like '*1131f6ad-9c07-11d1-f79f-00c04fc2dcd2*' or 'Properties' like '*89e95b76-444d-4c62-991a-0facbeda640c*')) and not ('Subject User Name' like '*$')) | stats count as Requests by User | sort -Requests
